roadmap.goal: Replace the process-global GLOBAL_VAR OnceCell with an injected immutable AppContext (ADR-0006 Option A), behavior-preserving.
roadmap.note: Single atomic step: removing the global breaks all callers until threaded, so the crate compiles only when complete. No DISTILL .feature scenarios (behavior-preserving refactor); the existing 85 tests are the acceptance net.

validation.rationale: single-step behavior-preserving refactor authored from ADR-0006

phases.name: Inject AppContext and remove the global

steps.name: Introduce AppContext, remove GLOBAL_VAR OnceCell
criteria: Immutable AppContext built in main and threaded by borrow through the use cases.
GLOBAL_VAR static and free get_global_var accessors removed; no process-global config remains.
All tests pass under both cargo nextest run and threaded cargo test.
clippy -D warnings and pedantic clean; no new dependencies.
